title: aeonium laxum
intro: Aeonium laxum, also known as the spoon-leaf or tree aloe, is a succulent plant species native to the Canary Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe burns, wounds, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aeonium laxum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Aeonium laxum is often prepared as a herbal remedy by extracting its sap, which can be applied topically or used in ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
